622 CENTRL_DSCHRG_CD CENTRL_DSCHRG_CD Other: IV Access - Central (Discharge) CHAR 1 This column documents whether, at the time of discharge, the patient had central IV access. 0 = No 
1 = Yes
- = Not Assessed/No Information
